text: I feel a sense of intrigue as I wander these dimly lit, mostly deserted halls. The blue and purple glow from the glass-walled room draws my mind towards thoughts of isolation and introspection. The mention of "R+D" on the wall hints at purpose and innovation, but the silence amplifies an uncanny emptiness. I am both curious and unsettled, present in a space that feels equally full of potential and haunted by absence.
